name: research-plugin
description: Lean Codex research-state workflow with MCP-controlled memory, permissions, resources, and Modal SSH sandboxes.

interface.shortDescription: Claims, experiments, repo-file resources, and Modal SSH sandboxes
interface.longDescription: A lean research-state plug-in where Codex operates through skills and an MCP server controls durable memory, permissioned mutations, resource sync, workflow state, adversarial review records, and Modal sandbox provisioning the agent drives over SSH.
defaultPrompt: Use Research Plugin to plan an experiment.
Use Research Plugin to run and review this experiment.
Use Research Plugin to sync resources and update claims.
